creator: matt@lv223.org
text:
Hi,
After installing the latest revision of security/amavisd-new (revision:	490317), had the same errors:

Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[43069]: (43069-16-6) Requesting process rundown after 21 tasks (and 16 sessions)
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[42261]: (42261-15-6) Requesting process rundown after 20 tasks (and 15 sessions)
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[43069]: (43069-16-6) _WARN: [43069] BDB S+N DESTROY INFO (db_snmp): db_close: BDB0061 PANIC: Invalid argument, No such process. at (eval 93) line 
49.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[43069]: (43069-16-6) _WARN: [43069] BDB S+N DESTROY INFO (db_nanny): db_close: BDB0060 PANIC: fatal region error detected; run recovery, No such p
rocess. at (eval 93) line 49.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[42261]: (42261-15-6) _WARN: [42261] BDB S+N DESTROY INFO (db_nanny): db_close: BDB0060 PANIC: fatal region error detected; run recovery, . at (eva
l 93) line 49.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[88567]: sd_notify (no socket): STATUS=Starting child process(es), ready for work.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[88567]: sd_notify (no socket): STATUS=Starting child process(es), ready for work.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[68866]: (!!)TROUBLE in child_init_hook: BDB can't connect db env. at /var/amavis/db: BDB0087 DB_RUNRECOVERY: Fatal error, run database recovery, No such file or directory. at (eval 93) line 338.
Jan 21 23:00:04 mx /usr/local/sbin/amavisd[68866]: (!)_DIE: Suicide in child_init_hook: BDB can't connect db env. at /var/amavis/db: BDB0087 DB_RUNRECOVERY: Fatal error, run database recovery, No such file or directory. at (eval 93) line 338.

Commenting '$enable_db =1;' fixes the problem though as outlined by Marko and takefu.
Reverting to security/amavisd-new (revision: r482297) and re-enabling '$enable_db =1;' errors vanished.

11.2-RELEASE-P6 (amd64) on UFS filesystem
Oracle Berkeley DB, revision 5.3 from port databases/db5
